infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VisionWeave uses your camera to provide real-time composition guidance.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VisionWeave uses your location to find nearby photo spots and calculate sun position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VisionWeave uses your location for proactive shoot opportunity notifications.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: VisionWeave uses your location for photo spots and sun timing.
